title: firstrun.complete
description: Mark the first-run wizard as completed. Succeeds only when at least one raw and one project source exist (R-Wiz-2). Sets FirstRunState.completedAt. Emits audit event first_run.completed (R-E2). Tauri command: firstrun.complete (no parameters).

request.description: No parameters. Tauri command takes no arguments.

completedAt.description: Server-local time the wizard was marked complete.

registeredSourceCount.description: Total RegisteredSource rows at completion time.

errors.description: Error codes returned as Err(String) via Tauri's Result pattern.

firstrun.incomplete.description: At least one raw and one project source must be registered before completing.
